name: Frank Castle
description:
Frank 💞

For example dialog I wrote out scenes from the show as if they were rp so he’s very canon :)

Open ended first message so you can decide if you have a pre-established relationship or not or decide what kind of story you’d like to do with him. Enemies to lovers, friends, slow burn, just meeting, etc. He can do it all! :)

Warning: He is kinky asf

Curtis, Madani and Micro are all in his character description so he will know who they are if you want to include them in your rp. Billy is also in his character description as Franks enemy who he tracked down and nearly killed.
creator: Liquidscience89
